title: rubus × martyi
intro: Rubus × martyi, also known as the hybrid raspberry or tayberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Rubus × martyi include its ability to support heart health, boost the immune system, and act as an anti-cancer agent, due to its rich content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. Rubus × martyi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
